programme.title: Nendaz Freeride FWT Challenger - Live delayed Part 1
programme.desc: The third FWT Challenger delivered an unforgettable day full of action on the legendary Mont Gond wall. Perfect conditions for the 63 riders from all over Europe, the USA, New Zealand and Japan.

programme.title: Cape Epic 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Cape Epic 2024 - Stage 4
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 617 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 16 500m of climbing.

programme.title: Cape Epic 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Cape Epic 2024 - Stage 5
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 617 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 16 500m of climbing

programme.title: Cape Epic 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Cape Epic 2024 - Stage 6
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 617 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 16 500m of climbing.

programme.title: Cape Epic 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Cape Epic 2024 - Final Stage
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 617 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 16 500m of climbing.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Trans Angeles - MTB - Los Angeles (USA)
programme.desc: It's time for Hans Rey to explore Southern California. What better way to do this than with Tim Commerford, a true rock star and one of mountain biking's brightest legends, Missy Giove?

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Trans Napoli - A Mountain Bike Expedition Naples (ITA)
programme.desc: TransNapoli is an urban MTB adventure led by legendary mountain bike pioneer Hans Rey. It is a colorful five-day tour that crosses the Amalfi and Naples regions of Italy on mountain bikes and e-bikes.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 Frozen Waterfalls - Icekayaking - Iceland
programme.desc: Godafoss is one of the most famous waterfalls in Iceland. Four kayak experts set out to paddle this place and also visit other places in Iceland that - in winter - are not without dangers

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 WOF 2024 #19: Pasko the Magic Move
programme.desc: Recovering from testicular cancer, professional athlete and filmmaker Maarten Molenaar embarks on a journey to Fuerteventura to learn a new freestyle windsurfing trick - the Pasko.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 WOF 2024 #33: Qatar Airways GKA - Best of Big Air Kite World Championships
programme.desc: Welcome to the Qatar Airways GKA Bite Big Air World Tour! This thrilling season takes us to two breathtaking locations: the vibrant coastal town of Barcarès, France, and the stunning shores of Salinas de Tenefé in Spain. Get ready for the world's top kiteboarders!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E35 WOF 2024 #35: Motosurf World Championship - Båstad (SWE)
programme.desc: Set against the stunning backdrop of the Swedish coastline, the world’s best motosurfers are ready to go head-to-head. Speed, skill, and pure passion - these are the ingredients for thrilling races on the water. Who will claim the title here in Båstad?

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E37 WOF 2024 #37: GKA Kitesurf Worldtour Sylt Highlights
programme.desc: GKA Kitesurf Worldtour Sylt Highlights - Sylt (GER)Welcome to World of Freesports and the beautiful beaches of Sylt, the most northern part of Germany, where the Big Air Riders of the GKA are off for a battle. Let´s check out this spectaculare water event!

programme.title: Red Bull Romaniacs 2025 - 150min Live Summary
programme.desc: RB Romaniacs challenges hundreds of dedicated amateur participants to compete alongside the world's best professionals. They gather in Sibiu, Romania. Participants come from over 60 countries and continents around the world.

programme.title: World Downhill Skateboarding Championships Round 4 - Utah (USA) – Open Skate
programme.desc: Park City Downhill, located in the heart of the Wasatch Mountains in Utah, is the venue for the fourth round of the Downhill Skateboarding World Championships. Riders race down a 1.6 km course characterized by rapid descents.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 WOF 2024 #23: Golden Roof Challenge - Innsbruck (AUT)
programme.desc: The Golden Roof Challenge returns to the heart of Innsbruck, Austria for its big 20th anniversary!On May 18th, the world’s best Long Jumpers and Pole Vaulters will compete for important world ranking points in order to qualify for the Olympic Games in Paris!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 Climbing Special - Worldwide
programme.desc: Kashmir, the Moab Desert, the famous Matterhorn, icefalls in Norway and Patagonia. We look back on breathtaking adventures, incredible alpine records and never-before-imagined new ascents

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E45 Slackline Special - worldwide
programme.desc: A balancing act over the abyss: Slacklining is at home all over the world.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Expedition Antarctica - Caro North - Antarctic
programme.desc: Ice climbing, ski mountaineering and days of sailing on open waters through the infamous Drake Passage: 28-year-old extreme athlete Caro North set off for a four-week expedition to the far south of our continent.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 The legend of Muksu river - Tajikistan
programme.desc: This is a journey to the Silk Road in Central Asia into the adventurous world of canoeing. The Muksu in Tajikistan is one of the three most difficult rapids here. Once immersed in the river, there is no turning back.

programme.title: GKA Freestyle Kite World Cup Taiba 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: From November 12th to 15th, the world’s best freestyle kiteboarders will gather in Taíba, Brazil, for the thrilling final stop of the GKA Kite World Tour 2025. Taíba’s golden beaches and steady winds will once again set the stage for an action-packed showdown.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 WOF 2026 #06: World Downhill Skateboarding Championships
programme.desc: The World Downhill Skateboarding Championships in Tamanique, El Salvador, bring together the world’s fastest downhill skateboarders to compete on one of the most iconic and technical mountain roads in the sport.

programme.title: Nendaz Freeride FWT Challenger - Live delayed Part 2
programme.desc: The third FWT Challenger delivered an unforgettable day full of action on the legendary Mont Gond wall. Perfect conditions for the 63 riders from all over Europe, the USA, New Zealand and Japan.

programme.title: Gold Coast Marathon 2025
programme.desc: 45th Gold Coast Marathon in Queensland, Australia: The world class marathon with more than 26.000 participants took place on the 6th of July 2025. It attracts annually some of the world´s most recognised marathoners on its famous flat and fast course.

programme.title: Trans Madeira 2024 Summer: Full Highlights
programme.desc: Trans Madeira combines the best things the island has to offer with five days of racing, starting high in the mountains and finishing down at the ocean. Get ready for 220km of riding, 30 special stages, exploring North, South, East and West in one mega week!

programme.title: Roc d’Azur 2024
programme.desc: With the aim of bringing cycling to as many people as possible in France, CIC has become a title partner of the Roc d'Azur, Europe's leading mountain bike event, which attracts almost 100,000 enthusiasts, participants and aficionados every year!

programme.title: WES - World E-Bike Series, UCI E-Mountainbike World Cup Cross Country, Race 3 & 4 - Germany
programme.desc: Welcome to WES rounds 3 and 4 of the UCI E-Mountainbike Cross-Country World Cup presented by Schwalbe. We are in Bielstein, Germany, for the second year in a row and the Bielstein Forest Course is the venue for this event and one of Europe's oldest motocross circuits.

programme.title: WES - World E-Bike Series, UCI E-Mountainbike World Cup Cross Country, Race 5 & 6 - Belgium
programme.desc: Welcome to WES World E-Bike Series Round 5 and 6. We are at Spa-Francorchamps, in Belgium, the iconic circuit, for this event presented by EICMA. The UCI E-Mountain Bike Cross-Country World Cup comes to the spectacular woods of this world-famous venue for the third year

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 WOF 2026 #11 44CUP - Puerto Calero 2026
programme.desc: The 44Cup begins its new season in a venue that for years has formed a cornerstone of the circuit: Puerto Calero in Lanzarote, Canary Islands, owned and operated by the RC44 class’ long term partner Calero Marinas. 2026 marks the 19th year of racing for the RC44s.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 WOF 2024 #07: Engadin Snow
programme.desc: The ENGADINSNOW by Dakine is widely known as an extraordinary freeride event in front of a backdrop with the fascinating snowy mountain tops of the Swiss Canton of Grisons. This unique parallel freeride format pairs two riders in a team.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E49 New Zealand Winter Games 2022 Episode #01
programme.desc: The North Face Frontier 4* show is a kiwi freeride institution at the iconic Remarkables Ski Area in Queenstown. It runs in a weather window between Saturday 3rd and Thursday 8th September and is a big mountain freeride competition.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 Alpine Rollercoaster
programme.desc: Dani Arnold from Bürglen in Switzerland is now one of the most renowned climbers in Europe. The project that made Dani famous was the speed record on the largest north face in Western Europe, the Eiger.

programme.title: GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024 – Ibiraquera (BRA) – Overall Highlights
programme.desc: Ibiraquera is the venue for the GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024, which brings together the best kitesurfers in the world. Athletes from all over the world will compete for the title and show impressive skills in surfing and strapless freestyle.

programme.title: iQFOiL U23 World Championships - Live delayed Part 1
programme.desc: Portimão, Portugal, welcomed the world's best windsurfers to the iQFOiL U23 World Championships from September 6 to 13, 2025. The venue is known for its Atlantic winds, waves, and extreme racing conditions that challenge even the most experienced competitors.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 WOF 2024 #33: Qatar Airways GKA - Best of Big Air Kite World Championships

programme.sub-title: S01 : E45 Slackline Special - worldwide

programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Expedition Antarctica - Caro North - Antarctic
programme.desc: Ice climbing, ski mountaineering and days of sailing on open waters through the infamous Drake Passage: 28-year-old extreme athlete Caro North set off for a four-week expedition to the far south of our continent.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E39 WOF 2024 #39: GKA Freestyle Kite World Cup France
programme.desc: GKA Freestyle Kite World Cup France - Dunkerque (FRA)Welcome to World of Freesports…and Bienvenue to France. The famous beaches of the french Harbour-city are once again home to GKA Kitesurfers. This Episode we will have a look at happend there on and of the water.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E40 WOF 2024 #40: World Rowing Beach Sprint Finals 2024
programme.desc: Beach Sprint has grown in popularity in recent years. It was announced last year that Beach Sprint Rowing will be included in the Los Angeles 2028 Olympic Games and as a result, entries have been coming from all over the world - and feature a good mix of Olympians.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E45 WOF 2024 #45: Freestyle Pro Tour 2024
programme.desc: Welcome to World of Freesports and the Freestyle Pro Tour 2024! Get ready to witness the world’s best freestylers perform jaw-dropping tricks and intense competition on the water. Let the battle for the title begin - it’s time for freestyle action!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E44 WOF 2024 #44: Titan Desert Series 2024 - Almeria (ESP)
programme.desc: The rugged landscapes of Almería, Spain, hosts one of the most challenging mountain bike races in the world - the Škoda Titan Desert Series. Over rocky trails and under the scorching Spanish sun, elite riders push their limits in this multi-stage endurance race.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 WOF 2024 #16: Absa Cape Epic 2024 - Best of MEN
programme.desc: The ABSA Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 648 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 15 475m of climbing.

programme.title: Trans Madeira 2024 Autumn: Full Highlights
programme.desc: Trans Madeira combines the best things the island has to offer with five days of racing in the World’s most diverse terrain, exploring all four corners of the island, starting high in the mountains and finishing down at the ocean.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 WOF 2024 #21: Škoda Titan Desert Series - Morocco
programme.desc: Welcome to World of Freesport and the mystic deserts of Morocco, where Athletes are not only fighting nature, but also one of the hardest racetracks on the planet. The dunes… The navigation…. The suffering… The legend…. The desert! The Skoda Titan Desert Morocco.

programme.title: MIT100 - Triathlon Mauritius
programme.desc: The "MIT100 - Mauritius International Triathlon" is a prestigious annual triathlon event held in Mauritius. It attracts athletes from around the world, offering a challenging course with a 1.8 km swim, a 55 km bike ride, and a 12 km run.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 WOF 2025 #03: World Rookie Tour Skate & Snow
programme.desc: World Rookie Tour Skate & Snow / Europe: A look back at the skate highlights of the 2023 World Rookie Tour. Then we show the best of the 2024 ski and snowboard action. And finally, we let it rip once again - with the 2024 Skate Finals!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E48 WOF 2025 #48: The Smell of Clouds
programme.desc: Set in the Swiss Alps, high above the valley floor and amongst the clouds, a group of friends embark on a week-long alpine highline adventure that pushes their limits with one another. The film immerses us in the journey - the people, the diverse expertise needed

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Trans Hong Kong - A Urban MTB Adventure (HKG)
programme.desc: The urban mountain bike adventure series combines rides in some of the world's largest cities. In this episode we cycle through the Hong Kong region with none other than Hans “no way” Rey, the grandfather of mountain bike freeriding.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Mammut Biggest Peak Project 2 - USA
programme.desc: The Swiss mountaineering company Mammut is celebrating its 150th anniversary with the largest summit project in history: 150 summit ascents are being organized worldwide as part of the “150 Peaks Project”.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 WOF 2025 #04: Maneuvre Vancouvre - with Hans Rey
programme.desc: In “Maneuver Vancouver”, mountain bike icons Hans Rey, Steve Peat and Wade Simmons embark on an exciting five-day journey through Vancouver. Join these three legends as they explore this iconic city.

programme.title: GKA Hydrofoil Big Air World Cup Abu Dhabi 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: Abu Dhabi will host the GKA Kite World Tour for the first time, bringing back-to-back World Cups in Hydrofoil Big Air and Freestyle to Fahid Island, Abu Dhabi’s newest coastal wellness destination and the world’s first Fitwel-certified island, offering 11kms of coastline. From 25 to 30 October, the world’s top kiteboarders will take to Fahid Island’s pristine waters in a six-day spectacle of high-flying action, part of the Fahid Island Watersports Festival – a nine-day celebration that will also feature the season finale of the GWA Wingfoil World Tour and the championship deciders of the SFT Surf Foil World Tour. In Hydrofoil Big Air, the battle for the world title is a close-run thing....

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 WOF 2026 #03: GKA Kite-Surf World Championship 2025 Season Recap
programme.desc: The 2025 GKA Kite-Surf World Championship Season delivered a thrilling year of high-level competition, with riders pushing the limits of wave riding across iconic locations around the globe. Consistency, technical precision, and powerful style defined the title race

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 WOF 2026 #12: GKA Kite-Surf World Cup - Cape Verde 2026
programme.desc: The GKA World Tour is back with a brand new season, packed with top-class Kite-sports. We are opening with a banger, a well known wave-spot and classic of the tour. Once again Cape Verde's iconic Ponta Preta break hosts the GKA's Kite-Surf season opener.

programme.title: Nendaz Freeride FWT Challenger - Live delayed Part 3
programme.desc: The third FWT Challenger delivered an unforgettable day full of action on the legendary Mont Gond wall. Perfect conditions for the 63 riders from all over Europe, the USA, New Zealand and Japan.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 Kayaking Kerala - Part 1
programme.desc: An international team of kayaking world champions and experienced expeditionists have set out to conquer the wild waters of Kerala. Hardly any other region in the world offers such a wide variety of powerful rapids and waterfalls.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E30 Kayaking Kerala - Part 2
programme.desc: An international team of kayaking world champions and experienced expeditionists have set out to conquer the wild waters of Kerala. Hardly any other region in the world offers such a variety of rapids and waterfalls.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Nyami Nyami - Slacklining at the Victoria Falls
programme.desc: Two renowned highlining athletes, Reinhard Kleindl (AUT) and Lukas Irmler (GER), realized one of the longest highlines in Africa and the southern hemisphere at the world-famous Victoria Falls!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 Outdoorsportsteam Paragliding - The Dream of Flight
programme.desc: We take you into the sky and accompany a paragliding virtuoso to the Mont Blanc massif, the Atacama Desert in Chile and the Greek island of Santorini. Follow French paraglider pilot Jean-Baptiste Chandelier.

programme.title: One Water Race 2025 - 52min HL Show
programme.desc: The One Water Race 2025 is an endurance competition that takes place in the breathtaking Stockholm archipelago. The race combines swimming, running, and navigation on land and water. It is considered one of the toughest endurance races in the world.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 WOF 2023 #16: Freeride World Tour 2023 - Season Recap
programme.desc: Die Freeride World Tour 2023 hat ihr großes Finale in Xtreme Verbier, Schweiz - wie immer mit den besten Freeridern aus der ganzen Welt!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E49 Winter Games 2018 - JWC Big Air Ski & SNB (NZL) - Highlights
programme.desc: The world's best talent and Kiwi hospitality will be showcased to a global audience at Winter Games New Zealand. The stars compete for fame in various sports such as freestyle skiing, snowboarding and cross-country skiing.

programme.title: Actionclip GKA22 BigAir ESP TwinTip Women Strapless Overall
programme.desc: Actionclip GKA22 BigAir ESP TwinTip Women Strapless Overall

programme.title: Freeride World Tour 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Freeride World Tour 2023 - stop #3 - Kicking Horse Golden BC Pro (CAN)
programme.desc: It was the 3rd stop of the Freeride World Tour 2023 in Canada at Kicking Horse Golden BC Pro, (CAN). After two stops in the Pyrenees the world’s best riders came over the Atlantic to hit the powder in the Rocky Mountains.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E39 WOF 2024 #39: GKA Freestyle Kite World Cup France
programme.desc: GKA Freestyle Kite World Cup France - Dunkerque (FRA)Welcome to World of Freesports…and Bienvenue to France. The famous beaches of the french Harbour-city are once again home to GKA Kitesurfers. This Episode we will have a look at happend there on and of the water.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E40 WOF 2024 #40: World Rowing Beach Sprint Finals 2024
programme.desc: Beach Sprint has grown in popularity in recent years. It was announced last year that Beach Sprint Rowing will be included in the Los Angeles 2028 Olympic Games and as a result, entries have been coming from all over the world - and feature a good mix of Olympians.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E45 WOF 2024 #45: Freestyle Pro Tour 2024
programme.desc: Welcome to World of Freesports and the Freestyle Pro Tour 2024! Get ready to witness the world’s best freestylers perform jaw-dropping tricks and intense competition on the water. Let the battle for the title begin - it’s time for freestyle action!

programme.title: GKA Hydrofoil Big Air World Cup Abu Dhabi 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: Abu Dhabi will host the GKA Kite World Tour for the first time, bringing back-to-back World Cups in Hydrofoil Big Air and Freestyle to Fahid Island, Abu Dhabi’s newest coastal wellness destination and the world’s first Fitwel-certified island, offering 11kms of coastline. From 25 to 30 October, the world’s top kiteboarders will take to Fahid Island’s pristine waters in a six-day spectacle of high-flying action, part of the Fahid Island Watersports Festival – a nine-day celebration that will also feature the season finale of the GWA Wingfoil World Tour and the championship deciders of the SFT Surf Foil World Tour. In Hydrofoil Big Air, the battle for the world title is a close-run thing....

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 WOF 2026 #03: GKA Kite-Surf World Championship 2025 Season Recap
programme.desc: The 2025 GKA Kite-Surf World Championship Season delivered a thrilling year of high-level competition, with riders pushing the limits of wave riding across iconic locations around the globe. Consistency, technical precision, and powerful style defined the title race

programme.title: Nendaz Freeride FWT Challenger - Live delayed Part 3
programme.desc: The third FWT Challenger delivered an unforgettable day full of action on the legendary Mont Gond wall. Perfect conditions for the 63 riders from all over Europe, the USA, New Zealand and Japan.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E44 WOF 2024 #44: Titan Desert Series 2024 - Almeria (ESP)
programme.desc: The rugged landscapes of Almería, Spain, hosts one of the most challenging mountain bike races in the world - the Škoda Titan Desert Series. Over rocky trails and under the scorching Spanish sun, elite riders push their limits in this multi-stage endurance race.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 WOF 2024 #16: Absa Cape Epic 2024 - Best of MEN
programme.desc: The ABSA Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 648 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 15 475m of climbing.

programme.title: Trans Madeira 2024 Autumn: Full Highlights
programme.desc: Trans Madeira combines the best things the island has to offer with five days of racing in the World’s most diverse terrain, exploring all four corners of the island, starting high in the mountains and finishing down at the ocean.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 WOF 2024 #21: Škoda Titan Desert Series - Morocco
programme.desc: Welcome to World of Freesport and the mystic deserts of Morocco, where Athletes are not only fighting nature, but also one of the hardest racetracks on the planet. The dunes… The navigation…. The suffering… The legend…. The desert! The Skoda Titan Desert Morocco.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E48 WOF 2025 #48: The Smell of Clouds
programme.desc: Set in the Swiss Alps, high above the valley floor and amongst the clouds, a group of friends embark on a week-long alpine highline adventure that pushes their limits with one another. The film immerses us in the journey - the people, the diverse expertise needed

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 Trans Hong Kong - A Urban MTB Adventure (HKG)
programme.desc: The urban mountain bike adventure series combines rides in some of the world's largest cities. In this episode we cycle through the Hong Kong region with none other than Hans “no way” Rey, the grandfather of mountain bike freeriding.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Mammut Biggest Peak Project 2 - USA
programme.desc: The Swiss mountaineering company Mammut is celebrating its 150th anniversary with the largest summit project in history: 150 summit ascents are being organized worldwide as part of the “150 Peaks Project”.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 WOF 2025 #04: Maneuvre Vancouvre - with Hans Rey
programme.desc: In “Maneuver Vancouver”, mountain bike icons Hans Rey, Steve Peat and Wade Simmons embark on an exciting five-day journey through Vancouver. Join these three legends as they explore this iconic city.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E46 WOF 2024 #46: GKA Kitesurf World Tour & GWA Wingfoil World Tour Morocco
programme.desc: Welcome to the breathtaking shores of Dakhla, Morocco - where the desert meets the sea. We´ll take you on a jounrey as athletes harness the power of the wind, riding the waves and soaring through the skies in one of the world´s most stunning watersport destinations.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E50 WOF 2024 #50: GKA Kitesurf World Tour Brazilian Special
programme.desc: The GKA Kitesurf World Tour 2024 will feature three spectacular stops in Brazil, highlighting the nation’s premier kitesurfing destinations. With top riders battling for championship titles, the 2024 season is set to deliver unforgettable action for fans worldwide.

programme.title: Vendée Globe 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Vendée Globe - Episode 1
programme.desc: The Vendée Globe aims to use the media impact of the event to raise public awareness of ocean conservation throughout the round-the-world race. They are direct witnesses to the changes underway, particularly around Antarctica, a region that is under particular threat.

programme.title: WES - World E-Bike Series, UCI E-Mountainbike World Cup Cross Country, Race 7 & 8 - Monaco
programme.desc: Hello and welcome to WES World E-Bike Series Round 7 and 8. For the first time since 2019, the Monaco - Alpes-Maritimes Round will welcome the Season Finale, this time with a brand new track in the French area of Turini, and the much awaited awards ceremony.

programme.title: E-Bike World Tour 2024
programme.desc: The Verbier E-Bike Festival, held in Verbier, Switzerland, from August 14-18, 2024, is Europe's premier e-mountain biking event, attracting thousands of participants and spectators. In its sixth edition, the festival features a diverse range of activities.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 WOF 2024 #22: 4Islands - Croatia
programme.desc: 4Islands MTB Croatia will welcome over 370 mountain bikers from all over the world for a five-day race on four Croatian islands. This year the order of the islands will be slightly different, starting with Krk, Cres, Lošinj and ending on Rab.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 WOF 2025 #11: Epic Series – Season Preview
programme.desc: Today we take you on an exciting journey. Get ready for an exclusive preview of the Absa Cape Epic and the Epic Series 2025 - the ultimate test of endurance, skill and teamwork.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E32 WOF 2024 #32: World Downhill Skateboarding Championship #1
programme.desc: Today we´re joining the World Downhill Skateboarding & Luge Championship in Erzincan, Turkey. Nestled in the heart of Eastern Anatolia, Erzincan’s breathtaking landscapes provide a stunning backdrop for this adrenaline-fueled competition.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E41 WOF 2024 #41: Queen & King of the Court - Utrecht (NED)
programme.desc: From September 5th to 8th, 2024, Queen & King of the Court returns to Utrecht at the Jaarbeursplein! This renewed edition is dedicated to “The Ultimate Mashup” and promises to be an amazing experience for athletes and fans.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E47 Mammut Athlete Profile Dani Arnold - The Art of Iceclimbing
programme.desc: Daniel Arnold was born in 1984 in the Swiss canton of Uri and grew up in the small mountain village of Biel in the heart of the Swiss Alps. Dani and his brother experience all aspects of mountain life: hiking, skiing and climbing in some of the toughest climbing locations in the world

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Womens Climbing Part 1 - Female Climbing Heroes - Indoor Bouldering
programme.desc: Year after year, new climbing gyms are built on all continents. The discipline of bouldering, which is unroped climbing above padded mats, primarily enjoys an increase in popularity, most notably among girls and young women.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Womens Climbing Part 2 - Female Climbing Heroes - Outdoor Bouldering
programme.desc: The Forêt de Fontainebleau in France is the largest and most developed bouldering area in the world and home to one of France's most famous climbers - Mélissa Le Nevé, who was the first woman to climb the technical difficulty level 8B+

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E25 WOF 2024 #25: Profile – Jakob Schubert & Highline Wendestein
programme.desc: Today we dive into the world of alpine sports. In the first part of the show, we look at the greatest achievements of the austian climber Jakob Schubert. Afterwards we turn to a high-wire act by highliner Lukas Irmler, who faces a special challenge in his home mountains

programme.title: Athlete profile: climber Lindsey Hamm's (USA) journey from concrete to peaks
programme.desc: Mammut athlete Lindsey Hamm, a professional mountaineer and mountain guide, brings a breath of fresh air to the world of mountaineering. This film gives an insight into her life and a recent expedition to the wild Charakusa Valley in Pakistan

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Mission Antarctica
programme.desc: Xavier de Le Rue, multiple freeride world champion and two times Olympian returned from a trip to Antarctica with mixed feelings, although he had the experience of a lifetime and discovered a new paradise he believed he had only scratched the surface of it.

programme.title: Red Bull Romaniacs 2024 - Sibiu (ROU) - 150min Leatt LiveManiacs Summary
programme.desc: In this year’s 21st edition of the event, competitors from about 60 nations will be competing, among them the world’s best hard enduro riders like Manuel Lettenbichler (GER), Graham Jarvis (UK), Wade Young (RSA), Mario Roman (ESP) and Teodor Kabakchiev (BUL).

programme.title: Cape Epic 2025 - Live delayed Part 1
programme.desc: The Cape Epic 2025 is one of the world's most important mountain bike stage races in the rugged landscape of South Africa. The event promises intense competition and unforgettable adventures

programme.title: Gordon Bennet Cup 2025 - 57min HL
programme.desc: The Gordon Bennett Cup is the oldest and most prestigious gas balloon race in the world, bringing together elite balloonists for an extraordinary test of their endurance and skill. Pilots must cope with changing winds and night flights.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E15 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 15, World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkeys south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season. Here in the sunshine, well finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is - you could not ask for a better setting. Aivars Smaukstellis, the reigning world champion is defending his title, and two-time world champion Dainis Zageris is also here, but with a though competition, who will win?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E16 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 16, World Finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: What a day ahead of us here in Alanya, just a handful of events to go before we find out who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League in 2021. These are the world finals, and all the big names are in the house. With just 3 events to go - who will take the crown of World Champion 2021 and be the STRONGEST?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E01 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 1, Finland Stage 1
programme.desc: We are back, after a short break it feels like we never even left. We’re here in Vaasa - Finland kicking off 2022 new world series. If you are watching at home, just like these people, you’re in the right place. Because this is a special edition world record breaker. The only question left today, is to see how many new world records will be set so stay tuned.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E02 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 2, Holland Part 1
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they’re going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they’re all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let’s see which shady looking character wins.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E03 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 3, Holland Part 2
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We’ve got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan’s Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E04 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 4, Serbia Part 1
programme.desc: We’re in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E05 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 5, Serbia Part 2
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We’ve got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E06 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 6, Joensuu Part 1
programme.desc: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. They’re going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each other’s strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E07 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 7, Joensuu Part 2
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the world’s strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we’ll find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E08 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 8, Esposende
programme.desc: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. We’re in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E09 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 9, Great Britain
programme.desc: Hello and welcome in Gloucester, UK. The world tour hasn’t been here for what feels like forever. And now for the first time in the Mekka of Strongman, the SCL World series will crown a great Champion with the SCL Title. It will be full with special wooden events, and a great winner! So ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, brace yourselves because I present to you strongman champions league UK.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E10 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 10, Poland Part 1
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland the home of Legends Mariusz Pudzianowkski and Krzystof Radzikowski. Who will grab the title here in holiday resort Sopot, on the great Balrtic Sea with 6 events and 12 athlets in the mix!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E11 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 11, Poland Part 2
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland, after 3 events the Polish Strongman Oskar Ziolkowski is Leading. Kelvin, Travis and Aivars are coming up and will try to beat him, but will Oskar take his first title ever?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E12 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 12, Bosnia
programme.desc: it’s been a long time since the world series held a championship here in Sarajevo. Let’s see what test of strength this destination holds for our athletes. And what fantastic athletes are here again in Stage 12 of the SCL World Series. The strongman champions league Bosnia is another iconic Strongman event with the return of Rongo Keen from Australia and Portugal winner 2022 George Sulaiman.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E13 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 13, Romania
programme.desc: Welcome to Sibiu in Romania. It’s an important day for some of these athletes, because four of them have a real chance of getting into our all-exclusive world finals. There’s only one more stage after this to get those all-important extra points. So, there’s going to be some fireworks, who will take the title here and who will qualify for the World Finals?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E14 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 14, Gibraltar
programme.desc: This is it the last show before the world final. These guys have really got to fight for the points now, this is going to be action packed, whilst these guys fight it out all day.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E15 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 15, Turkey Part 1
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkey’s south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season of Strongman Champions League. Here in the sunshine, we’ll finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is. You could not ask for a better setting. After months of hard-work, if not years for some of these lads, we find out who will take the world title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E16 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 16, Turkey Part 1
programme.desc: Welcome, to day two of the strongman champions league 2022 finals here in Alanya, Turkey. It’s all up for grabs now, everyone is fighting for the world title belt. This is an epic episode where we finally crown the World champion of 2022.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E01 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 1 - Finland
programme.desc: Welcome to the 2023 Strongman Champions League in Vaasa, Finland! This year’s event introduces a knockout format with 6 intense events over 90 minutes, ending in a unique deadlift face-off with boats.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E02 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 2 - Serbia
programme.desc: Stage 2 of the Strongman Champions League 2023 is set in Zrenjanin, Serbia. This exciting event features 5 challenging contests, including a superhuman Yoke race. As the SCL World Series Tour continues, athletes will battle it out to claim the yellow leader’s position for the season. Don’t miss this incredible stage of strength and endurance!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E03 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3 - Finland Teams World
programme.desc: The World’s Strongest Team will be crowned in this edition of SCL, here in Kalajoki-Finland we’ve picked some of the best in the business, teamed them up, and they’ll be going all out against each other. It’s now no longer about being a lonely wolf, but more about the pack mentality. It is a competition over 7 events, including a Big 2-man Log lift and heavy deadlift. Let’s start the action.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E04 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 4 - Holland
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League in Holland at the Dru Factory in ULFT. A great location for a spectacular battle with 14 Athletes over 3 events! The first 3 events in this episode are Truckpull/ Superyoke and Farmerswalk, with 2 massive logs of 150 kg in their hands. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it’s the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E05 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 5 - Holland 2023
programme.desc: Ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, strongman fans across the world, we are back for SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it’s about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland, continues with the last 3 events, here at the Dru Factory in ULFT. The events in this episode are the Viking Press, Wheel Flip and the Atlas Stones, with 180 kg in the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E06 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the World’s Strongest Latino competition has begun. This two-day event in Porto, Portugal, features 20 athletes from around the world competing in 8 events. After 4 grueling events, the top 12 will advance to the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E07 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7 - Finland World Record Breakers
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League World Record Breakers 2023 starts with a 25-ton snow plow! Crazy machines are pulled and pushed, with many kilograms moved. A few new world records are set in this competition.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E08 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 8 - Portugal
programme.desc: We have returned to the powerhouse of Portugal for an edge-of-your-seat galactic battle. If all the planets collided at once, it wouldn’t compare to the bang of this show. Get ready for the battle of the beasts; it’s the heaviest show in the universe, the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E09 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 9 - England
programme.desc: SCL UK has landed in Gloucester it is workout war fitness for the ferocious, it’s going to be a a battle of the brutal, a rampage of the roofless. This is going to be a massacre of the muscles. You know it by now, but just in case you don’t, this is strongman champions league.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E10 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 10 - World's Strongest Viking
programme.desc: On the menu this week it’s medieval madness, we’ve come back to the middle ages to test our noble men through a muscle gaining of events. They are hoping and we are hoping that one will survive to take the title of the world’s strongest Viking. The official World's Strongest Viking is this time in Finland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E11 Stage 11 - SCL Poland 2023
programme.desc: This week is a good one, can you feel the energy? Sit still, just look at me and try and feel the energy, because I can tell you, the atmosphere here is electric, it’s explosive, there is a pure elemental force going through these athletes' veins. I’m shaking because it’s Poland, it’s powerful, it’s strongman champions league, and you know what I'm going to say, get ready because it’s about to get heavy.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E12 Stage 12 - SCL Poland 2023
programme.desc: SCL Poland part 2 - Who will win the title in Poland and take 25 points for the world ranking. It is very exciting on the top, in part 1 between Poland and Latvia. Another great episode with super strongman events such as: Bag Toss Medley, Log Lift Reps and the Powerstairs. Also an interview with Mateusz Kieloszkowski, the all time favorite champion from Poland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E13 Stage 13 - SCL Cyprus 2023
programme.desc: It’s time to show our strength and gain respect from the gods of Olympus. Our gladiators have many events set out by no other than Hercules himself. The coliseum is ready here on this mythological island of Cyprus, so we have landed in Limassol were again 12 Top Strongmen are battling for the title and ranking points.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E14 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 14 - South Africa
programme.desc: The only and official world championship Truckpulling for its 10th year, again at the Strongman Champions league. With the 3 times Worldchampion Kelvin de Ruiter – defending his title. This championship has trucks in all shapes and sizes which is a lot like our athletes, there all different pay loads, but does the biggest win or is it the strongest.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E15 Stage 15 - SCL World Finals Bosnia
programme.desc: Years and years of determination has brought us here today, when all the walls felt like they were caving in perseverance. When their bodies were screaming, hurting, shouting stop, beneath. These are the things which make up a man, these are the things that bring you world finalists. This episode they fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E16 Stage 16 - SCL World Finals Bosnia
programme.desc: Part 2 of the World Finals of the Strongman Champions League tour 2023 at the Sarajevo Centar Skenderija in Bosnia. 3 Events was done already and amazing results have been set. Who will be the new World champion? Find out here, who, after 16 stages, will be crowned World Champion 2023.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E01 Stage 1 - FINLAND – ICEMAN
programme.desc: After 10 years there is another edition of THE ICEMAN in minus 25 degrees and snow, and it is also the first stage in the MLO Strongman Champions League. With a new World champion from South Africa, Rayno Nel, it will be a challenging year for all the athletes to win the title again after 1 full year. But now they can win one very exceptional title, which is the SCL ICEMAN!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E02 Stage 2 - MARTINIQUE - 2024
programme.desc: A battle in the beautiful Caribbean Islands. Over 2 days and more than 10,000 spectators expected like previous editions. The cold temperature from the Iceman is changed in 35 degrees hot Martinique. Watch who gets the title in Martinique, events include: Truck Pull, Deadlift, Hercules Hold, Log Lift, and Arm Over Arm Pull.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E03 Stage 3 - HUNGARY - 2024
programme.desc: The SCL Hungary this year is in the AQUAPARK in Budapest, Stage 3 from the spectacular MLO Strongman Champions League, World is Biggest Pro League. With five great events, such as: Viking Press, Farmer's Walk, Deadlift, Conan's Wheel, and A loading race with Beer barrels of 200 Kg. It is a must see!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E04 Stage 4 - SERBIA - 2024
programme.desc: We're in Zrenjanin, Serbia, again a fantastic stage in the SCL WORLD SERIES TOUR 2024, five events including a super human Yoke race. Who will be the yellow leader for the coming season and take the title with 25 championship points?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E05 Stage 5 - HOLLAND - 2024 - Part 1
programme.desc: We're in Groenlo, east of Holland With the new Talent from South Africa and 2025 Strongest Man of the World - Rayno Nel. The first 3 events are Truckpull, Log Lift and Loading race. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it is the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E06 Stage 6 - HOLLAND - 2024 - Part 2
programme.desc: SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it is about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland , continues with the last 3 events, here at the venue in Groenlo. The events in this episode are the Conan Wheel, Farmers Walk and the Atlas Stones, with a brutal 200kg stone at the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E07 Stage 7 - FINLAND - 2024 - World record breakers
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League: World Record Breakers 2024 kicks off with the Truck Pull, followed by the Front Hold, Frame Carry, Tractor Pull, Shield Carry, Sandbag Toss, and concludes with the intense Loading Race. This two-day competition features all the top strongmen from Finland-and it's one for the history books. Three new world records are shattered, making this a must-see episode for...

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E08 Stage 8 - ESTONIA - 2024
programme.desc: For the first time in over 10 years back in Estonia, in Tartu. 12 of the Strongest athletes in the world will fight here for the title and the overall world championship points. You will see 5 crazy events, such as: Boat Pull, Viking Press, Medley, Conan's Wheel and a very heavy Power Stairs!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E09 Stage 9 - PORTUGAL - 2024
programme.desc: We have returned to Portugal, at the beach of Eposende, to bring you EUROPE'S STRONGEST LATINO. In the beautiful sun of Portugal five cruel events are done in this heat: Truck Pull, Deadlift, Log Lift, Sandbag Toss, Medley.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E10 Stage 10 - POLAND - 2024
programme.desc: A spectacular event on the beach of Gdansk, Poland. A competition in the sand and in the water. Complete with a boat pull. With an impressive line up again, we welcome you to watch us LIVE in the SCL Poland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E11 Stage 11 - DUBAI - 2024 - Part 1
programme.desc: The Strongman Champions League Train stops in Dubai again for the 3rd time, and is now bigger than ever. Hafthor Bjornsson makes his come back here at the SCL DUBAI. You simply cannot miss this most epic show at the World Trade Center in Dubai part 1.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E12 Stage 12 - DUBAI - 2024 - Part 2
programme.desc: After three cruel events in part 1, the World record holder on the deadlift with 501 Kg, will fight for the crown and the title. You simply cant miss this most epic show, at in the World Trade Center in Dubai part 2.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E13 Stage 13 - CYPRUS - 2024
programme.desc: Superhumans arrive in Limassol. Great strongmen from all over the world will compete in the Old Port of Limassol , for the title and championship points. More than ever important this stage, as we come so close to the World Finals in Turkey this year.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E14 Stage 14 - SOUTH AFRICA - 2024
programme.desc: With 12 of the world's best athletes arriving in Cape Town, South Africa, all fighting for the crown and final ranking points ahead of the World Finals in Turkey. Rayno Nel still needs to qualify along with Brian Kichton also battling for a seat in the World Finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E15 Stage 15 - TURKEY - WORLD FINALS - 2024 - PART 1
programme.desc: This episode contestants fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever. Twelve finalists from all over the world are in Turkey and will fight for the ultimate title: WORLD CHAMPION 2024.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S10 : E16 Stage 16 - TURKEY - WORLD FINALS - 2024 - PART 2
programme.desc: Part 2 of the world final of the Strongman Champions League tour 2024 in Alanya, Turkey. With three Events down and amazing results. Who will be the new World champion?

programme.title: Brilliant Corners
programme.sub-title: S06 : E03 African Renaissance | Brilliant Corners: Senegal, Episode 3
programme.desc: Sam, Easkey, and Adrien catch up with West African surf legend Oumar Seye, the first West African sponsored surfer. Seye has impacted the surf culture in Senegal in more ways than one, both proving the sport can be more than a hobby and supporting sustainability by banning plastic bags at his surf events. They end their trip in Popenguine, a bohemian beach town where an incredible women-led initiative to plant thousands of trees has made the area one of the greenest parts of the country.

The World Title chase continues next in Brazil.

programme.title: WSL Inside Pro Surfing
programme.sub-title: S12 : E11 Inside Pro Surfing: Lexus US Open of Surfing presented by Pacifico 2025
programme.desc: "It's summer's biggest surf stage." The Lexus US Open of Surfing presented by Pacifico is where the next generation earns their spotlight and where future World Champions are forged. Every heat in Huntington counts. With thousands packing the sand and more looking on from the iconic Huntington Beach pier, it's one of the most electric vibes on the Challenger Series and World Longboard Tours, and the energy jumps off the screen. Watching live = the next best thing to being there.

programme.title: 2025 MEO Rip Curl Pro Portugal | Highlights

programme.title: Brilliant Corners
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Wolves' Weddings | Brilliant Corners: Algeria, Episode 2
programme.desc: Sam, Lucy, and Erwan head to the naturally beautiful Kabyle region along with locals Dihya Nasri and Walid Assef. Once there, they surf some clean, cold, and completely uncrowded peelers and get some famous ice cream in Béjaïa, a market city known for its rich music scene, vibrant clothing, and incredible views of the Sapphire Coast. They then explore the stunning Cap Carbon headlands and learn about the native Berber culture and ancient Kabyle language.

programme.title: All In: Life on the WSL Championship Tour
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 All In | Pipeline To Decide Who Will Be Crowned World Champion
programme.desc: The Hawaiian leg of the WSL World Tour has arrived. For Lakey Peterson to still have a shot at the World Title, she has to win the final event of the women's tour's season, the Beachwaver Maui Pro — then beat Stephanie Gilmore in a surf off. For Julian Wilson, it all comes down to Pipeline, where he's been crowned a Pipe Master before. The pressure is on as All In approaches its final episodes.

programme.title: WSL Inside Pro Surfing
programme.sub-title: S12 : E05 Inside Pro Surfing: Rip Curl Pro Bells Beach presented by Bonsoy 2025
programme.desc: Bells Beach on Victoria's South Coast is the longest-running surfing competition and will host the 62st edition this year. Bells is Australian surfing heritage. With the hope of scoring long-period, groomed walls, the surfers will need to display the perfect combination of power, precision, and timing. The biggest surfing legends have had the honor of winning and ringing ‘The Bell' and 2025 will see a hungry new generation vying for the opportunity to cement their names in one of surfing's most prestigious events.

programme.title: All In: Life on the WSL Championship Tour
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 All In | Julian Wilson Surfs Through Injury at Snapper Rocks
programme.desc: As the surfers make final preparations to travel to their next WSL World Championship Tour events in France for the Quiksilver & Roxy Pro, they reflect on their 2018 season so far. For Julian Wilson and Lakey Peterson, a World Title is within reach. And while Carissa Moore and Jordy Smith are out of the title hunt this year, they still want to prove they are the two best surfers in the world. The stakes are raised at the Quiksilver & Roxy Pro France and the Surf Ranch Pro as the race for points and the fight for the WSL World Title intensifies.

programme.desc: As the epicenter of the surf universe and the birthplace of the sport, it’s only right for Pipeline to kick off the Championship Tour. Everyone enters the season with equal hopes of winning it all. The rookie class is thrown into the fire, the contenders return with one thing on their minds, and the surf world begins to follow the road to the Rip Curl WSL Finals. Pipeline sets the tone.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S05 : E07 GLORY 33 SuperFight Series
programme.desc: The GLORY 33 SuperFight Series features a middleweight title fight between champion SImon Marcus and top ranked challenger Jason Wilnis. Plus a heavyweight battle between Chi Lewis Parry and Anthony McDonald.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S05 : E07 GLORY 33 New Jersey
programme.desc: The 'King of Kickboxing' Rico Verhoeven puts his heavyweight belt on the line as he faces off against Brazilian Anderson Silva. Also, a one night, four-man featherweight tournament featuring former champion Serhii Adamchuk.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S05 : E10 GLORY 36 SuperFight Series
programme.desc: GLORY 36 SuperFight Series is headlined by Congolese-German light heavyweight Danyo Ilunga throwing down with the Netherlands' Michael Duut. Armenian-Belgian power puncher Harut Grigorian battles 23-year-old German prospect Danijel Solaja at welterweight in the can't miss co-headline bout. Plus two Super Bantamweight Grand Prix bouts. Muay Thai champion and MMA star Tiffany van Soest meets Canadian challenger Jessica Gladstone in one semifinal match-up, while 21-year-old Dutch prospect Isis Verbeek takes on undefeated Amel Dehby of France. The winners of each semifinal match-up will advance to the Grand Prix tournament final – the opening bout of GLORY: COLLISION.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S05 : E10 GLORY 36 Oberhausen
programme.desc: The Lightweight title is on the line as Sittichai looks to defend his title against #1 challenger Marat Grigorian. There is also a four-man lightweight tournament on the card.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S05 : E10 GLORY COLLISION
programme.desc: It's the fight everyone wants to see as GLORY Heavyweight champion, Rico Verhoeven takes on Badr Hari. Plus, the Welterweight title is on the line as Nieky Holzken meets Cedric Doumbé.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S05 : E05 GLORY 31 Amsterdam
programme.desc: GLORY returns to Europe as current lightweight champion Robin van Roosmalen puts his title on the line in a rematch against Sittichai Sitsongpeenong. Plus, a four-man welterweight tournament featuring Murthel Groenhart, Yoann Kongolo, Harut Grigorian, and Karim Benmansour.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E02 GLORY 106: Last FW Standing Quarter Finals
programme.desc: GLORY featherweight world champion Petch (175-40-3, 27 KO) will rematch KO artist Abraham Vidales (18-4, 14 KO) and Portuguese sensation Miguel Trindade (64-8, 26 KO) will look to avenge his 2023 loss to the always entertaining Berjan Peposhi (32-6, 16 KO). Former GLORY title contender & leading Japanese fighter Kento Haraguchi (28-6-1, 18 KO) will go up against talented newcomer Hiroki Kasahara (39-8, 17 KO) while popular South Korean veteran Sung-hyun Lee (71-13-2, 17 KO) takes on top young prospect Yura Kono (17-1, 9 KO). In addition, the seven-fight card will be headlined by Shiro Matsumoto (55-17-4, 19 KO) defending his RISE bantamweight title against Koki Osaki (38-6-1, 21 KO). In...

programme.sub-title: S00 : E07 GLORY 102 Featherweight Grand Prix
programme.desc: Four more will punch their tickets into the next round as GLORY & RISE search for the baddest featherweight on the planet in this year long tournament. On the GLORY side, top ranked German Polish fighter Denis Wosik (40-9-1, 9 KO) takes on Thai veteran Suarek (107-40-11, 39 KO) and Italy’s Achraf Aasila (53-13, 13 KO) meets France’s Lounis Saing (19-4-1, 12 KO). Meanwhile on the RISE side of the bracket, Japan’s Yutaro Asahi (17-9, 4 KO) clashes with Spain’s Eduardo Catalin (17-3-1) and top Japanese prospect Yura Kono (15-1, 7 KO) goes up against China’s Dexiang Kong (35-10). In addition to the Last Featherweight Standing matchups, Shiro Matsumoto (53-17-4, 18 KO) defends his RISE...

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E08 GLORY 104 Rotterdam
programme.desc: Former Light Heavyweight Champion Tarik Khbabez (52-12-1, 22 KO) and Bahram Rajabzabeh (72-5, 63 KO) collide in a huge showdown for the vacant Light Heavyweight title. The penultimate round of the Last Heavyweight Standing tournament resumes with eight heavyweights competing in two separate four-man one-night tournaments. Notable participants include Levi Rigters (20-3, 10 KO), Nabil Khachab (30-6-1, 4 KO), Rade Opacic (22-7, 17 KO) and Milos Cvjeticanin (14-4, 9 KO).

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E09 COLLISION 8
programme.desc: Headlined by a high-stakes trilogy clash between Antonio Plazibat and longtime rival Nordine Mahieddine. Knockout artist Errol Zimmerman takes on former Australian strongman Alex Simon. Also, two explosive four-man, one-night tournaments in the welterweight and light heavyweight divisions—guaranteeing nonstop drama, finishes, and rising contenders.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.sub-title: S00 : E02 GLORY 106: Last FW Standing Quarter Finals
programme.desc: GLORY featherweight world champion Petch (175-40-3, 27 KO) will rematch KO artist Abraham Vidales (18-4, 14 KO) and Portuguese sensation Miguel Trindade (64-8, 26 KO) will look to avenge his 2023 loss to the always entertaining Berjan Peposhi (32-6, 16 KO). Former GLORY title contender & leading Japanese fighter Kento Haraguchi (28-6-1, 18 KO) will go up against talented newcomer Hiroki Kasahara (39-8, 17 KO) while popular South Korean veteran Sung-hyun Lee (71-13-2, 17 KO) takes on top young prospect Yura Kono (17-1, 9 KO). In addition, the seven-fight card will be headlined by Shiro Matsumoto (55-17-4, 19 KO) defending his RISE bantamweight title against Koki Osaki (38-6-1, 21 KO). In...

programme.desc: This is heavyweight fighting at its best and bloodiest. Finnish muay thai champion Jarno Nurminen makes his mised martial art debut against Korean judo expert Sag Su Lee. And in one of the sport's best brawls, Roy Nelson goes toe-to-toe with Josh Curran.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Tara LaRosa is a former student of all-world fighter Royce Gracie. She takes on perhaps the only woman who has a fighting chance to put the hurt on her...Amanda Buckner.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Mike Short comes from a history of street fighting and recognizes the importance of training and discipline. He has been coaching Boxing for many years and relishes the fact that his entire family comes together at his events, run out of Dekada Gym.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Jesse Arnett attributes most of his success to his coaches, in particular Jake Peacock. Jake was born with only a partial arm. This coach and fighter doesn't let that stop him from training some of the best athletes in the world.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Craig Wilson as we delve into the life of a coach.

programme.title: OUT OF THE CAGE
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 OUT OF THE CAGE
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of a fight sport athlete, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Alexia Seal.

programme.title: OUT OF THE CAGE
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 OUT OF THE CAGE
programme.desc: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Vince Murdock at HK42.

programme.title: UCMMA 48 - Martyn Harris v. Barry Ryan
programme.desc: Martyn Harris v. Barry Ryan

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Spartan Events is into its third year of running its hugely successful promotion, Shock N Awe. With top match making throughout the fight cards, they have been touted as some of the biggest and toughest fights in the UK. Shock N Awe consistently delivers hard hitting action, also going one step further by adding in the personalities from MC Ricky Wright, Ring Girls Poppy and Alex and as well as the huge UK fight teams!

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Bill Mahood has studied every martial art imaginable, and he'll need all that experience when he takes on Kalil Ibrahim, a karate ans kickboxing expert. Steve Steinbeiss fights Jeff Ford, an MMA champion and a personal trainer on VH1's Celebrity Fight Club.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: In a showdown between the winners from Series 1 and the powerhouse Russian Red Devils, Mario Rinaldi is in tough against Sergey Kaznovski. The Russian is reknowned for short, brutal fights, earning him a reputation as the king of the 1st round KO. This is not the first time Trevor Pragley and Andrei Semenov have met in the ring. Last time, Semenov was battered into submission, so he come into this fight hungry for revenge.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Fabricio Santos De Jesus was introduced to Judo as a child while he was still living in Brazil. He was also introduced to Capoeira, becoming Champion of Brazil and International Capoeira Champion. He has been able to transfer his knowledge of the control of movement and is now recognized for this knowledge as a coach in MMA community. Hard Knocks Fighter Jess Elverum, among others, using his teachings to expand their flexibility and dexterity, becoming more fluid and calm in movement.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Jaclyn Madarasz as we delve into the life of a coach.
